author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(tools): update eslint and make all rules pass (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#947)
body:
A couple notable changes are:
- prettier is still disabled
- code is still in ES5/CommonJS
- jsdoc is slightly more complete
- exact same versions of eslint and plugins as in monorepo are used
- some tests are slightly cleaned up (removed duplicate and using test.each)

FX-2333
